title: Library Time 图书馆
scene: 两个同学在学校图书馆借书。

lines.en: Excuse me, I would like to borrow a book, please.
lines.zh: 打扰一下，我想借一本书。

lines.en: Of course! What kind of book are you looking for?
lines.zh: 当然可以！你想找什么类型的书？

lines.en: I'm looking for a book about animals. I love animals!
lines.zh: 我想找一本关于动物的书。我喜欢动物！

lines.en: We have a great animal section. It's in the corner over there.
lines.zh: 我们有一个很棒的区域。在那个角落。

lines.en: Thank you! How many books can I borrow at a time?
lines.zh: 谢谢！我一次能借几本书？

lines.en: You can borrow up to three books for two weeks.
lines.zh: 你最多可以借三本书，借期两周。

lines.en: That's great! What happens if I don't finish in time?
lines.zh: 太好了！如果我没读完怎么办？

lines.en: You can come back and renew the book for another week.
OK, I understand. Do I need a library card?
lines.zh: 好的，我明白了。我需要借书卡吗？

lines.en: Yes, here is your new library card. Take good care of it!
lines.zh: 需要，这是你的新借书卡。好好保管！
